So the action plan is very simple because it's all about hitting this goal of launching your profile, reaching your first hundred good followers and then starting to monetize. This as it says right here is to supplement the manual. So not to replace it. The very first step is you got to get your account set up, get your profile rolling. And as you'll see throughout this, we've given you the links that you need to all the various components to tell you what to do. Then you start regularly adding content. This is something that you're going to do day in and day out on a regular basis. Consistency is the key. The more you post, the more you grow, the more you build. You're going to invite your friends and family just to kind of get the low hanging fruit. You're going to start to promote your page everywhere. So anywhere you can, whether it's your email, your website, your business card, you name it, then continue to expand and engage your network on a daily basis. So it's not just about posting content. It's also about being social. It is a social network. There's a strategy to that. And then you're going to make sure that as you have good posts, that you're going to promote those posts. So if you're wondering, how do people with huge accounts get there? The reality of it is to really get it started, most of them actually paid to promote their posts. So you're not going to just promote any posts. You're only going to do the ones that have proven to be ideal for your audience. So we've provided more training on how to do that in the manual. And then once you've got it going, you got the content, you got people engaging, you got people buying, make that first sale and make sure that you celebrate.
